sections.title: Collaborations with Aya
paragraphs: Some collaborations promote a brand. Ours create a world around it.
When a brand joins Aya, it doesn’t appear as an ad. It appears as part of a universe already loved.

sections.title: Why Aya
paragraphs: Aya already has a world — and an audience inside it.
Aya reaches over 1.7 million people every month through Pinterest, the website and travel notes — drawn to soft living, fragrance, beauty and slow rituals.
A brand placed inside this world doesn’t ask for attention. It receives it.

sections.title: Ways to Collaborate
list: Featured pin series on curated Pinterest boards
Editorial features across Letter, Travel, News
Co-created visual content in Aya’s aesthetic
Long-form brand partnerships across the year

sections.title: Visual Portfolio
paragraphs: Aya x Brands is the Pinterest portfolio of collaboration concepts, brand worlds and editorial directions created inside Aya’s universe.

sections.title: Who We Work With
paragraphs: Aya works with the brands its readers would have discovered anyway.

sections.title: Collaboration Approach
paragraphs: For us, collaboration is not placement — it is the creation of a shared world.
Each partnership begins with a conversation about the brand’s audience, the season, and what story is worth telling now.
list: Pinterest pin series and board curation
Co-created content for site and app
Long-form brand partnerships across the year

sections.title: Development Direction
paragraphs: Aya Muse World is moving from digital into physical — a future palace, retreats and hospitality spaces.
Open to strategic and investment partnerships in this direction.

sections.title: Start a Collaboration
paragraphs: If your brand belongs inside this kind of world — we’d love to hear from you.
See the Aya x Brands portfolio, or write to us directly.
